goal: Design any 2D daily mobile puzzle that captures Wordle's stickiness without copying Wordle's mechanics. Physics is fair game.

games.title: Trail Weaver
games.tagline: Shift the streets until a clean route clicks into place.
games.description: Players tap row and column handles to align a route from the left gate to the right lantern plaza. The objective is instantly readable, but chasing lower move counts gives the game a real mastery curve.
games.signatureHook: Whole streets move at once, so one tap can make the route suddenly snap into place.
howToPlay: Tap a row arrow to shift that row right.
Tap a column arrow to shift that column down.
Connect the left gate to the right goal.
Anyone can clear the board, but hitting par moves is the mastery chase.

games.title: Bloom Balance
games.tagline: Rotate terrace petals to water every sprout.
games.description: The player rotates concentric flower terraces so water reaches each seed in sequence. It feels calm and readable, and the best move chase supports daily mastery without any word knowledge.
games.signatureHook: One tap rotates a whole flower ring, turning the board into a living irrigation toy.
howToPlay: Rotate a ring with one tap.
Finish quickly to earn a perfect garden.

games.title: Conveyor Commons
games.tagline: Shuffle tiny belts until the package reaches the dock.
games.description: Players nudge conveyor rows and columns to deliver one package across a toy warehouse. It is easy to read, has strong replay value, and naturally supports efficiency-based stats.
games.signatureHook: A tiny warehouse comes alive when a single belt change sends the package racing across the map.
howToPlay: Guide the package to the dock.
Use fewer nudges for a cleaner delivery.

games.title: Signal Garden
games.tagline: Slide mirrors so one beam lights the whole courtyard.
games.description: A player shifts mirrors and blockers to reflect a light beam through marked targets. The fantasy is broad and family-friendly, but the interaction layer is slightly harder than the strongest candidates.
games.signatureHook: The moment the whole courtyard lights up from one clean beam path should feel magical.
howToPlay: Bounce the beam through every lantern.
Aim for a par-clear to master the puzzle.

games.title: Gravity Grove
games.tagline: Drop marbles through bumpers until every lantern wakes up.
games.description: Players release marbles into a tiny toy machine and let gravity, bumpers, and one-tap flippers do the rest. The goal is readable to all ages, while score chasing and better launch timing create the mastery layer.
games.signatureHook: A single marble run should feel like a pocket pinball moment that begs for one more try.
howToPlay: Use fewer launches or higher scores to master the board.
